items.title: SMTAX
items.description:
SMTAX is a digital tax, accounting and advisory firm that is a leader in the online solutions space. SMTAX is making it easier for individuals to start and manage their businesses with holistic business support services, anchored by a strong finance back-office with accounting, tax, payroll and compliance solutions.

Our vision is to grow the economy inclusively. Our mission is therefore to empower the small business sector with the tools and support it needs to grow. We have a key on the financial inclusion of black and previously disadvantaged individuals, thereby contributing to the transformation of our country.

items.description: RoomRaccoon is an all-in-one hotel management software for hotels, independent guesthouses, and lodges. items.title: CPI Performance Innovation Capetown
items.description:
Would you like improved fuel economy?
More Power and Torque?
Enhanced Throttle Response?
Smooth driving experience?

As we experiencing fuel prices that are always increasing, improvement in fuel economy of up to 20% means that CPI remap could pay for itself in less than 1 year, with the majority of vehicles it can be as little as 5 to 6 months. The question is can you afford not to do it?

We supply carefully optimized and performance orientated engine management software for virtually all cars out there today, so whether you drive a Vw or a Bmw, an Alfa or a Volvo, we will be able to improve your engines power, response and fuel economy for you. We use the best remapping system and software available.

items.title: PC Laptops
items.description: Founded in 1998, PC Laptops is a trusted name for refurbished computers and expert IT solutions. As a premier computer shop, we offer a comprehensive range of services, including sales of high-quality second-hand laptops and desktops, as well as specialised repair and maintenance. Our dedicated team of professionals provides skilled computer repair, software assistance, and reliable IT support. We serve customers throughout South Africa, delivering exceptional service and technical expertise from our base in Durbanville. Visit us to experience a wide selection of refurbished computers and reliable support.
